_comment: SAS credential + schema PDAs for three.ws. Populated by `node scripts/sas-bootstrap.js <network>`. Do not edit by hand — re-run bootstrap to refresh.

threews.verified-client.v1.name: verified-client
threews.verified-client.v1.description: Wallet has been verified by three.ws (KYC, payment history, or trusted introduction). Subject = client wallet pubkey (nonce). Used to weight feedback attestations.

threews.audited-validation.v1.name: audited-validation
threews.audited-validation.v1.description: Validation of an agent task result, issued by an authorized validator. Subject = agent asset pubkey (nonce). Carries higher weight than self-attested validations.

_doc.task_hash: string — hash of the task input/output bundle
_doc.passed: bool — whether the validator considers the work acceptable
_doc.report_uri: string — link to the validator's full report (Arweave/IPFS/HTTPS)
